chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1581 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.6201/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.6202/2025 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 20-10-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Hafeezullah Memon, Executive Engineer, Public Health Engineering Division, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. The instant Petition is pending on the file of this Court without useful progress, which is fixed today being date-by-Court, even then nobody has turned up today to pursue it. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner and their Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. No useful purpose would be served, if this petition is kept pending on the file of this Court for an indefinite period. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
